title: Delhi High Court grants protection to live-in couple who left their spouses
description: The Delhi High Court has granted police protection to a couple in a live-in relationship who had left their spouses and were receiving threats from the woman’s family. Justice Saurabh Banerjee observed that the petitioners, as citizens, are entitled to protection of their fundamental rights under Articles 19 and 21, including the right to life and personal liberty. He emphasised that whether the couple is married or in a live-in relationship is not a relevant consideration in such
